creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Looks good.

- Poudriere tests didn't finish on 11, since net/qt5-network doesn't build with default setup there.  This is just an FYI that there will be no package on 11.

- I've made some proposed cosmetic changes that are described in the Porter's Handbook, mostly in the 'Order of Variables...' chapter.  If you want to review those first, just let me know and I'll either upload a diff or create a Phab revision.
